themes.reasoning_notes: Cheap red instant that pushes lethal by stopping prevention; kicked mode adds 5 face damage, fitting aggressive burn-close games.
Its main text counters damage prevention effects for the turn, a narrow but relevant combat/damage-stack trick.
Kicked mode is direct face damage, and the prevention-hosing text mainly helps aggressive red decks push lethal through Fog-style effects.
Preventing all damage prevention can function as a narrow anti-Fog combat trick, but that use is situational rather than a core theme pull.
